headline: Flexible Solutions Reports Q2 Revenues of $7.4M, Down 35% Y/Y
summary: FSI's Q2 revenues fall 35% due to recognition of one-time R&D income in the year-ago quarter, lower Florida sales and deliveries shifting to Q3.
